responsibilities: Design and price complex structured products and exotic derivatives tailored to client risk and return objectives
Develop numerical pricing libraries implementing finite difference, Monte Carlo, and lattice methods for derivative valuation
Build and calibrate stochastic models for interest rates, credit spreads, and volatility surfaces used in product structuring
Collaborate with sales and trading desks to engineer bespoke hedging solutions for institutional and corporate clients
Validate and stress-test pricing models to ensure robustness across extreme market conditions and edge-case scenarios
Automate valuation and risk reporting pipelines integrating pricing engines with downstream trading and risk systems
Research and implement new quantitative techniques to improve pricing accuracy and computational efficiency of models
Document model methodology, assumptions, and limitations to support internal model risk governance and audit requirements
